title: eXplodVE
body:
# **eXplodVE**
*this modpack is currently in beta. expect differences in release.*

welcome to eXplodVE, a fun community oriented modpack made for my community!
this modpack contains many magic, tech, adventure, and world gen mods.

The world is made up of a fantasy continent 10000 blocks wide. there are more than 300 structures and many animals and mobs to encounter as you explore them! more than a hundred armour sets and an insane amounts of weapons are at your disposal to defeat the bosses.

to register for the whitelisted smp, join the discord server.

this modpack is targeted at small communities who want to have fun but are bored of playing vanilla.

<details>
<summary>modlist</summary>
This list contains mods present only in XVED and XVE modpacks. XVED has a lot of extra mods which you propably do not want, XVE has only the client and server side mods along with optimization mods. You can dabble around and add mods yourself, get creative!
